runs.title: Add gzip compression to an API route (3 iter orchestra)
runs.blurb: Canonical orchestra demo. Surveyor maps the request path, Author writes the middleware, Auditor reviews the test. Finishes in ~90s for $0.019 across three models. Good intro to orchestra mode.

runs.title: Strip React 18 ReactDOM.render() calls, switch to createRoot
runs.blurb: Single-iter refactor across 23 files. Uses the react-18-to-19 plan template (first starter Stoa shipped). Auditor catches two test files that needed updating but weren't auto-rewritten. Fork to run on your own codebase.

runs.title: Generate API docs from Go source — 1 LLM call, 14 files updated
runs.blurb: Uses the docs-from-code plan template. Planner sets a tight budget ($0.08), Author drafts markdown sibling to each .go file, Synthesizer stitches them into a nav-able docs tree. Good example of a cost-bounded run with a small roster.
